setup: source "$HOME/.rvm/scripts/rvm" && rvm install ruby-4.0.2 2>/dev/null; rvm use ruby-4.0.2@ruby-4.0.2 && bundle install && rails db:create db:migrate db:test:prepare 2>/dev/null; true
archive: source "$HOME/.rvm/scripts/rvm" && rvm use ruby-4.0.2@ruby-4.0.2 2>/dev/null && rails db:drop 2>/dev/null; true
